title: Construct Binary Search Tree from Preorder Traversal
input_format: An array of integers `preorder`, which represents the preorder traversal of a BST.
output_format: The root node of the constructed BST.
constraints:
- `1 <= preorder.length <= 100`
- `1 <= preorder[i] <= 10^8`
- All values of `preorder` are **unique**.
